name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: 'Bug report: [TITLE]'
labels: ''

type: Bug

---

## EEP Branch: [field for devs]
## EE Branch: [field for devs]
## Pull request: [field for devs]

**Bug or Error Description**
A clear and concise description of the issue.

**How to Reproduce**
The steps required to reproduce the error. The more detailed, the better.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you believe should have happened.

**Screenshots**
If possible, include screenshots to help explain your issue.

**Config**
If possible, include the config (the user folder, excluding the shots folder inside it) that was in use when the issue occurred.

**Environment (please provide the following information):**
 - Eternity Engine Plus version (e.g., v0.1.0; if it is a pre-release version, specify which one)
- OS (Windows, Mac OS, etc.)

**Additional Information**
Please include any other information related to the issue here.
